title: clusia nogueirae
intro: Clusia nogueirae, also known as the "climax tree" or "pitch apple," is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clusia nogueirae include the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as the management of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Clusia nogueirae is often prepared as a tea or infusion, although some herbal preparations also involve the use of the plant's bark or leaves in the form of tinctures or salves.
